scene_summary: A sunlit garden-floor archive scene with two large black-ink document plates embedded in soil, plants, roots, translucent amber acetate scaffolds, circular source rings, pinned plot tags, and small fossil/specimen plaques. The strongest interaction anchors are the two printed paper fields, the lower amber rail, the circular specimen plaque, the lower-right fossil card, and visible plant/plot tag clusters.
usable_surfaces: large left black-ink archive document plate
large right black-ink civic paper field
translucent amber acetate rails and clipped plot sheets
orange source rings around plant nodes
pinned plant-map tags and plot edges
upper-left canopy grain and palm-frond wash

detected_objects.label: combahee-black-feminist-document-plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large skewed paper sheet at center-left with dense black ink illustration of grouped figures, visible document edge, stains, and rooted plant growth along the lower edge.

detected_objects.label: allied-media-civic-future-plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large right-side black-ink paper ground with a dominant tree canopy, crowd line, torn/stained paper edges, soil seams, and rooted field marks.

detected_objects.label: creative-capital-support-scaffold
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Broad translucent amber/yellow rail sweeping across the lower center and right, with visible curved cut edge, pinned corners, overlapping sheets, scratches, and soil seen through it.

detected_objects.label: homegrown-keystone-plant-map
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Upper-right amber clipped plot sheet with several black pin anchors, plant stems rising through it, visible transparent tag edges, and dark soil knots under the acetate.

detected_objects.label: Source Pathway Plaque
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-left circular framed plaque containing a radial fossil/fruit-section form with bright rim, dark center, and segment-like ridges.

detected_objects.label: mdn-dinosaur-specimen-inset
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-right raised rectangular fossil-like relief card, partially buried in soil and grass, with a framed border and grid of small specimen impressions.

detected_objects.label: picsum-forest-canopy-grain
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Upper-left margin is dominated by palm-frond canopy grain and dark green radial leaves casting a forest-wash texture over the plate edge.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is rich and legible but visually busy: two hero documents, multiple amber scaffolds, many plants, pins, rings, roots, and soil textures compete for attention. Interaction mapping should prioritize the clear document surfaces, acetate rails, and discrete specimen anchors.
